message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "Frontend" as Frontend
participant "API Gateway" as APIGateway
participant "Matching Service" as MatchingService
    participant "Controller" as Controller
    participant "Service" as Service
participant "Matching Database" as MatchingDatabase
    participant "Questions" as Questions
    participant "MatchRequests" as MatchRequests

User -> Frontend : PUT /api/find/match
Frontend -> APIGateway : PUT /api/find/match
APIGateway -> MatchingService : PUT /api/find/match
MatchingService -> Controller : checkForMatch(requestId)
Controller -> MatchingDatabase : find user's MatchRequest with requestId
MatchingDatabase -> MatchingService : user's MatchRequest
MatchingService -> MatchingDatabase : find another MatchRequest
MatchingDatabase -> MatchingService : another MatchRequest
MatchingService -> Questions : get a random question
Questions -> MatchingService : Question
MatchingService -> MatchingDatabase : create sessionInfo and attach to each MatchRequest
MatchingService -> MatchingDatabase : update the 2 MatchRequests
MatchingService -> Controller : user's MatchRequest
Controller -> APIGateway : 200 OK
APIGateway -> Frontend : 200 OK
Frontend -> User : switch to session page

@enduml
